examples: Russian television showed a film of the jet undergoing its trial flight from an airfield at Sukhoi's production plant in Komsomolsk-on-Amur.
Designed by Sukhoi and built by the company's Komsomolsk-on-Amur Aviation plant, the T-50 prototype flew for 47 minutes and landed on the plant's airfield.
There were two new passengers on the bunks below who had got on in the middle of the night, somewhere west of Komsomolsk-on-Amur.
